Package io.forja.components.inputs.fxNumberField

Class FxNumberField

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.VBox
io.forja.components.inputs.fxNumberField.FxNumberField
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class FxNumberField extends javafx.scene.layout.VBox
A styled numeric input with optional leading icon, prefix/suffix affixes, increment/decrement steppers, and validation-state variants.

FxNumberField is a composite VBox of two rows:

  1. A framed HBox carrying the leading icon (if any), an optional prefix FxLabel, the inner TextField, an optional suffix FxLabel, and a stepper column with up/down icons (when showSteppers is on).
  2. A FxLabel carrying the helper or error text — auto-hidden when both are empty.

The value is an ObjectProperty holding a Double or null when the field is empty. Typing is filtered against a regex that admits the sign, digits, and up to getDecimals() fractional places. On focus loss or ENTER, the current text is parsed, clamped to [min, max], and re-formatted; unparseable input reverts to the last committed value.

Setting setErrorText(java.lang.String) to a non-empty value auto-flips the variant to InputVariant.ERROR; clearing it does not auto-revert.

Builder usage:

     
      FxNumberField price = FxNumberField.builder()
          .value(9.99)
          .min(0.0)
          .max(1000.0)
          .step(0.25)
          .decimals(2)
          .prefix("$")
          .showSteppers(true)
          .helperText("Retail price, taxes excluded.")
          .build();
See Also:
  • InputVariant
  • FxNumberField.Builder

      Creates an empty FxNumberField with the default variant.

      value - initial numeric value, or null for empty

      Increments the value by getStep(), clamped to [min, max].

    • setErrorText

      public void setErrorText(String v)
      Sets the error text. Non-empty value auto-flips the variant to InputVariant.ERROR; clearing does not auto-revert.

    • isShowingError

      public boolean isShowingError()
      Returns whether the helper label is currently showing the error text.

    • builder

      public static FxNumberField.Builder builder()
      Returns a new FxNumberField.Builder for constructing an FxNumberField.
      Returns:
      a new FxNumberField.Builder instance
